description: Nuestra Familia is a Mexican American prison gang founded in 1965 at the Correctional Training Facility in Soledad, California. It operates primarily in Northern California and within prison systems, engaging in drug trafficking, extortion, and robbery. The gang is considered the leadership structure for the Norteños street gang and has a long-standing rivalry with the Mexican Mafia. It remains active with an estimated 250 members.

country_links.context: The organization has territory in Canada.
The organization has territory in Mexico.
